channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 8 com severidade Alta
• 3 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 Gentlemen RaaS Adds C-Based ESXi Locker To Cross-Platform Attacks - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a ESX, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5ZLWc2YklCS3JybDhJaE9qMi15U3Q3b2ptWUtHTzRzTEw2OHQ5MDh3Nmx6MjVvYTMyeVRaTkx6UUVBaElvdjV4dFNTZ0NUN2tYdUJodjlKZUNCaEtCT180?oc=5
 
📰 Securing air-gapped environments with Elastic on Google Distributed Cloud
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Elastic Security is now a native, embedded security layer for GDC air-gapped environments — bringing its agentic SecOps platform to government, defense, finance, and telecom teams running workloads disconnected from the public internet.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/google-distributed-cloud-air-gapped-environments
 
📰 Elastic wins fifth Google Cloud Partner of the Year award
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
For the fifth time, Elastic has been recognized for its achievements in the Google Cloud ecosystem, helping joint customers deploy generative AI solutions in search, security, and observability.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/elastic-wins-fifth-google-cloud-partner-of-the-year
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Microsoft Patches Critical ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372 Privilege Escalation Bug
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Microsoft has released out-of-band updates to address a security vulnerability in ASP.NET Core that could allow an attacker to escalate privileges. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-40372, carries a CVSS score of 9.1 out of 10.0. An anonymous researcher has been credited with discovering and reporting the flaw.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/microsoft-patches-critical-aspnet-core.html
 
🚨 Cohere AI Terrarium Sandbox Flaw Enables Root Code Execution, Container Escape
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.3
Resumo:
A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-5752, is rated 9.3 on the CVSS scoring system. "Sandbox escape vulnerability in Terrarium allows arbitrary code execution with root privileges on a host process via JavaScript prototype chain traversal," according to
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/cohere-ai-terrarium-sandbox-flaw.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-40613 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Coturn is a free open source implementation of TURN and STUN Server. Prior to 4.10.0, the STUN/TURN attribute parsing functions in coturn perform unsafe pointer casts from uint8_t * to uint16_t * without alignment checks. When processing a crafted STUN message with odd-aligned attribute boundaries, this results in misaligned memory reads at ns_turn_msg.c. On ARM64 architectures (AArch64) with strict alignment enforce...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40613
 
💣 22 BRIDGE:BREAK Flaws Expose Thousands of Lantronix and Silex Serial-to-IP Converters
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have identified 22 new vulnerabilities in popular models of serial-to-IP converters from Lantronix and Silex that could be exploited to hijack susceptible devices and tamper with data exchanged by them. The vulnerabilities have been collectively codenamed BRIDGE:BREAK by Forescout Research Vedere Labs, which identified nearly 20,000 Serial-to-Ethernet converters exposed
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/22-bridgebreak-flaws-expose-20000.html
 
📰 Microsoft releases emergency patches for critical ASP.NET flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft has released out-of-band (OOB) security updates to patch a critical ASP.NET Core privilege escalation vulnerability.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-releases-emergency-security-updates-for-critical-aspnet-flaw/
 
📰 New Lotus data wiper used against Venezuelan energy, utility firms
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A previously undocumented data-wiping malware dubbed Lotus was used last year in targeted attacks against energy and utilities organizations in Venezuela.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-lotus-data-wiper-used-against-venezuelan-energy-utility-firms/
 
📰 French govt agency confirms breach as hacker offers to sell data
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
France Titres, the government agency in France for issuing and managince administrative documents has disclosed a data breach after a threat actor claimed the attack and stealing citizen data.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/french-govt-agency-confirms-breach-as-hacker-offers-to-sell-data/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

💣 MNT price rises as KelpDAO exploit fears ease, outlook bullish - CryptoRank
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxORlo3aldLa2I4MVZfVUpKR2lFRGtEWENNcWFQZ3BQTjkwQS1wSUFiV085LU5yWk9vYVYtUndCVDBmWXR2aldCbmg0cjBfUW4xUkl5Ml9PZng5ZXZpTHRITkRxNm5Tcl94NDZ4anhEUVRCbjFuWjZMNEdBd1pQZ1ZyMThsLTFlcFNFcFVUcU40UVFRdy1mMmZ4VWJMWUxDZUJG?oc=5
 
📰 Vercel breach exposes the OAuth gap most security teams cannot detect, scope or contain - VentureBeat
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOY1Z2QzEtbjBGTU14WTlLY1Q0bmJKdHRSZUk4MzVlUW1jT0VNTTVBSWlvcURXZFcwZ1dYWWNfc29LTmZTTURWdjlnWkl5bEdoYXZKYWJPMm51VUdFTmNkZHo1RFdiaGw5dVBScVRVSUdtb0o2Ty0tT0lOSkRIQUhtNkhDZnJnekhtQXZFZU5iUTJac0tYYVhhcm9KbU1TaFBybS1QLWZrQ2ZnS2xzNmtqZ1YwbXZ5LWt0bjY0?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 20/04/2026 até 22/04/2026.
